title: Iterative epigenomic analyses in the same single cell.
author: Ohnuki H Venzon DJ Lobanov A Tosato G
content: S-EPMC8494233 PMC8494233 Iterative epigenomic analyses in the same single cell. Gene expression in individual cells is epigenetically regulated by DNA modifications, histone modifications, transcription factors, and other DNA-binding proteins.
